chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-229 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 12.02.2026 Syed Dilshad Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh Alongwith PI Nadeem, PS Kalri ---------------------- Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submits that missing person namely Muhammad Shabbir S/o Murad Ali has been surfaced, as was shown involved in Crime No.185 of 2026 registered with P.S Sachal, District East, Karachi for offence under Section 23(i)A of Sindh Arms Act, 2013. In this regard, he files copy of aforesaid FIR, which is taken on record. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner affirms the above facts. He therefore, is satisfied and does not wish to press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
